signals.text: Contract ended March 7, 2026 -- brand is CHURNED. Customer expressed interest in month-to-month pricing per Mar 3 internal notes
Zero email communication in last 30 days -- complete silence from both sides since contract end
No client-facing calls held in the last 60+ days per Granola -- account went dark before contract end
No upcoming calendar events scheduled -- no re-engagement meetings planned
During Feb 23 handoff, positive signals from Andreas were noted but Grace was flagged as inexperienced with Meta/UTMs
Contract details were unclear in Salesforce per Mar 6 standup -- administrative gaps may have contributed to churn
